title: The Rise of the Digital Marketplace
intro: 十年前出口要仓库和代理，如今一家小店就能触达全球买家。
paragraphs: A decade ago, selling goods abroad required warehouses, agents, and complex paperwork. Today a small business can reach customers on the other side of the world through a digital marketplace. These online platforms connect buyers and sellers directly, handling payment, logistics, and even customer service.

For consumers, the benefit is obvious: a wider choice of products at competitive prices. For sellers, the platform lowers the barriers to entering foreign markets, though it also exposes them to fierce global competition.

Cross-border e-commerce has grown rapidly, yet it raises difficult questions about taxation, data privacy, and consumer protection. Governments are still struggling to design rules that keep pace with technology.
As the digital economy matures, the firms that succeed will be those that combine efficient logistics with genuine trust.
cn: 十年前，向海外销售商品需要仓库、代理商和繁琐的书面手续。如今，一家小企业通过数字交易平台就能触达地球另一端的客户。这些在线平台把买家和卖家直接连接起来，并负责支付、物流，甚至客户服务。
对消费者来说，好处显而易见：可选的商品更多，价格也更有竞争力。对卖家来说，平台降低了进入海外市场的门槛，但也让他们直面全球范围内的激烈竞争。
跨境电商发展迅猛，却也带来了税收、数据隐私和消费者保护等棘手问题。各国政府仍在努力制定能跟上技术步伐的规则。
随着数字经济走向成熟，能够胜出的企业，将是那些把高效物流与真正的信任结合起来的公司。

questions.q: What is this passage mainly about?
options: the difficulties of exporting goods a decade ago
how digital marketplaces have transformed cross-border trade and the issues they raise
why governments should tax online platforms more heavily
the decline of traditional warehouses and agents
questions.explain: 主旨题。1-2 段讲数字平台如何改变跨境贸易并惠及买卖双方，第 3 段引出税收/隐私/消保等新问题，末段展望——B 概括最全面。A、D 只是首段引子。

questions.q: According to Paragraph 2, digital platforms benefit sellers by ___
options: lowering the barriers to entering foreign markets
guaranteeing higher prices for their products
removing the need for customer service
questions.explain: 细节题。第 2 段：平台降低了卖家进入海外市场的门槛（lowers the barriers to entering foreign markets）。B 与后半句"直面激烈的全球竞争"相反。

questions.q: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a challenge raised by cross-border e-commerce?
questions.explain: 细节排除题。第 3 段列举的难题是 taxation（税收）、data privacy（数据隐私）、consumer protection（消费者保护）三项；环境污染原文未提。

questions.q: According to the last paragraph, the firms that succeed in the digital economy will be those that ___
options: combine efficient logistics with genuine trust
questions.explain: 细节题。末段原句：能胜出的企业是把高效物流（efficient logistics）与真正的信任（genuine trust）结合起来的公司。

glossary.def: n. 文书工作，书面手续
adj. 有竞争力的，价格公道的
